title: CHRO
linkedin_summary: CHRO at Vanta as of May 2026. Previously VP People at Coda for 4 years, scaled team from 80 to 600 headcount. Earlier People roles at Stripe and Box.
recent_posts: Joining Vanta as CHRO. Compliance is becoming a real platform play and the team here is exceptional.
Coda was the best 4 years of my career. Grateful to everyone there.
